name: playwright-cucumber-ts
description: Automation Framework using Playwright with Cucumber and TypeScript

scripts.test: npx cucumber-js || cd . && npx ts-node src/support/reporters/custom-reporter.ts
scripts.test:tags: npx cucumber-js --tags @regression || cd . && npx ts-node src/support/reporters/custom-reporter.ts
scripts.test:parallel: npx cucumber-js --parallel 2 || cd . && npx ts-node src/support/reporters/custom-reporter.ts
